title: Test Type DVD
wikitext:
[]: Test-Type DVD             Quote Post by V » Sat Apr 12, 2008 9:01 am (one at a time so as not to spam) I've searched in the forum and heard mention of this: "01 Test-Type DVD" and Genesis 0:0 and Genesis 0:0' (promo videos). What are they, exactly? Which ones contain the "full opening and ending"? Whats different about this OP and ED, and what's different about the Test-type DVD and Genesis in general? I have tried using "search" and this yields no direct answers

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 12, 2008 12:15 pm It includes a whole bunch of interviews and animatics and stuff. I don't know how live any torrent would be.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Apr 12, 2008 12:27 pm thanks, but I mean what is it: how and why was it released?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 12, 2008 12:44 pm IIRC an extras disk in Renewal; and for the money, respectively.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 12, 2008 1:21 pm The Test-Type DVD was released to promote the upcoming Renewal DVD-Box, in containing the remastered episode 01, along with "music videos" edited by Masayuki going along with the full-length versions of "Zankoku na tenshi no teeze" and "Fly Me to the Moon". Genesis 0:0 supposedly is a preview of the TV show with staff interviews, and 0:0' a preview of the movie with cast interviews*, but I feel too lazy to confirm or deny right now. * Note to V: First hit off Google using evangelion genesis "0:0'" . If you don't know the typical round of quick tricks to use with search engines, now is the best time to learn. Even the first page of results for evangelion "01 test type" dvd was not without something that would have answered your question.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Apr 12, 2008 4:32 pm is this the one that contains the "Full Opening" including the clean images of Reiquarium stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 12, 2008 4:40 pm http://evacommentary.org/full-op/full-op.html

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Apr 12, 2008 7:38 pm Reichu wrote: http://evacommentary.org/full-op/full-op.html

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 12, 2008 7:58 pm ...... Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Apr 24, 2008 10:07 pm I don't really get what you mean. There was a full opening/ending on one of the 0:0 discs? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FRyo0FoKzqM this seems to have the screenshots in question--is this it, or a fanwork?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 25, 2008 3:28 pm That YouTube video is a mislabeled, badly compressed combo of the full-length opening and full-length ending videos that originate from the 01 Test-Type DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Apr 26, 2008 2:24 am http://youtube.com/watch?v=0kFhPVAhV_o > I read that topic you made about this back in 2006. do you think the text blurbs are relevant at all?
summary: []: Test-Type DVD             Quote Post by V » Sat Apr 12, 2008 9:01 am (one at a time so as not to spam) I've searched in the forum and heard mention of this: "01 Test-Type DVD" and Genesis 0:0 and Genesis 0:0' (promo videos). What are they, exactly? Which ones contain the "full opening and ending"? Whats different about this OP and ED, and what's different about the Test-type DVD and Genesi
